90.Domain Signals -> Robots.txt File: Excellent! Your robots.txt file is perfectly configured ({percentage}% score). This file tells search engines and AI crawlers exactly which parts of your website they can access, and yours is set up flawlessly for optimal crawling.
90.Domain Signals -> LLM.txt File: Outstanding! Your LLM.txt file is comprehensive ({percentage}% score). This special file provides clear instructions and brand information directly to AI models (like ChatGPT, Grok, etc.), helping them understand and represent your brand accurately.
90.Domain Signals -> Sitemap: Perfect! Your sitemap is well-structured and up-to-date ({percentage}% score). This XML file helps search engines discover and index all your important pages efficiently.
90.Site Signals -> Structured Data: Exceptional! Your JSON-LD structured data implementation is comprehensive ({percentage}% score). This markup helps AI systems and search engines better understand your content, products, and business details.
90.Site Signals -> Canonical URLs: Flawless! Your canonical URL setup is perfectly implemented ({percentage}% score). This prevents duplicate content issues by clearly telling search engines which version of a page is the main one.
90.LLM Signals -> Cluster Presence: Impressive! Your brand appears in most intent clusters ({percentage}% score). This means AI models frequently include your brand when users search for relevant topics or needs in your industry.
90.LLM Signals -> Cluster Dominance: Remarkable! Your brand leads competitors in key clusters ({percentage}% score). Your brand dominates important topic areas in AI responses, showing strong market leadership in AI visibility.
90.LLM Signals -> Brand Discovery: Outstanding! Your brand is easily discovered in brand searches ({percentage}% score). When users search for your brand name or related terms, AI systems readily recognize and surface your brand.
90.LLM Signals -> Brand Recommendation: Excellent! Your brand is frequently recommended in AI responses ({percentage}% score). AI models often suggest your products/services positively when users ask for recommendations.
90.LLM Signals -> Brand Comparison: Superior! Your brand performs exceptionally in comparisons ({percentage}% score). When AI compares brands, yours consistently stands out with clear advantages over competitors.
90.LLM Signals -> Pricing & Value: Perfect! Your brand dominates pricing conversations ({percentage}% score). AI responses highlight your excellent value for money, making your pricing perception very strong.
90.LLM Signals -> Quality & Durability: Exceptional! Your brand is recognized for quality ({percentage}% score). AI systems frequently mention your products for their high quality and long-lasting durability.
90.LLM Signals -> Style / Trends: Outstanding! Your brand leads in style and trends ({percentage}% score). Your brand is seen as trendy, fashionable, and aligned with current styles in AI discussions.
90.LLM Signals -> Fit / Usability: Excellent! Your brand excels in fit and usability ({percentage}% score). AI responses recognize your products for great comfort, perfect fit, and excellent user experience.
